历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3904→4527→5238→6275→7928, showing a continuous backward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 3400 places, with a baseline of approximately 7928 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 155→151→150→147→153, basically stable at around 150. The 2026 plan is 165, an increase of about 7.8% compared to 2025, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top 10), with stable and slightly rising rankings in recent years (9th from 2021 to 2024, 8th from 2025 to 2026). The university has strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, with a total of 99 incidents (64 negative), involving campus safety, teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinion issues. Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), but the dense negative public opinion may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Disciplines include A+ in Law, Geophysics, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, Marxist Theory; A in Water Conservancy Engineering, Biology, Business Administration, Chinese Language and Literature, etc., with 22 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025 (Physics Category estimated to increase from 261,000 to about 378,000, an increase of about 45%), intensifying competition. Wuhan University is located in Hubei (not the home province), enrolling about 130 students in Jiangsu in 2025, accounting for about 2.17% of the total national plan, with a moderate cross-provincial enrollment ratio. Jiangsu candidates have a high acceptance of universities in the Central China region, with no obvious regional preference suppression.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (cumulative backward shift of about 3400 places in the past 3 years), the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+7.8%) but a significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (about +45%), the somewhat negative school reputation but strong academic strength, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 7928. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8601, with a range of 8101–9101.

In 2023, it notably dropped to 687, rebounded to 553 in 2024, and then dropped again to 672 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 3 years is about 134 places, with a baseline of approximately 672 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 40→50→47→46→41 students respectively, showing a slight reduction trend in recent years. The 2026 plan is 35 students, a reduction of about 14.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th on the Soft Science Main Ranking in 2026 (Top 10), with stable and slightly rising rankings in recent years, indicating strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, with a total of 99 incidents (64 negative), involving multiple public opinion issues such as campus safety, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct. Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), but the dense negative public opinion may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Journalism and Communication A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Applied Economics A-, etc., with outstanding humanities and social sciences strength, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law popularity is polarized and wait-and-see, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, which aligns well with Wuhan University's advantageous liberal arts majors. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 521,000, with History Category estimated to increase from 97,000 to about 143,000 (+48%), significantly intensifying competition. Wuhan University is located in Hubei (not the home province), enrolling about 130 students in Jiangsu in 2025 (including both arts and sciences), with a moderate cross-provincial enrollment ratio. Jiangsu candidates have a relatively high acceptance of universities in the Central China region, with no obvious regional preference suppression.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings (dropped to 687 in 2023), the clear reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-14.6%), the substantial increase in History Category candidates in the province (about +48%), the somewhat negative school reputation but outstanding humanities and social sciences strength, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 672. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 663, with a range of 587–739.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 武汉大学医学类在江苏省2021年至2025年最低录取位次分别为3904名、4527名、5238名、6275名、7928名，呈现持续下滑趋势（位次数字逐年增大），五年间累计下降4024名， 年均降幅约1006名。招生计划方面，2021年14人、2022年10人、2023年11人、2024年15人、2025年16人，整体呈扩招态势。2026年医学类总计划为19人，较2025年增加3人，扩招 幅度约18.75%，计划增幅较为显著，对位次有一定下拉作用（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科依托学校强大的综合平台，临床医学、口腔医学等 专业享有较高声誉，在江苏省考生中具有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来医学类专业报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等长学制专业尤其受到高分考生青睐。武汉大学地处华中中心城市武汉，虽非长三角地区，但作为全国知名985高校， 对江苏考生仍具较强吸引力。江苏省内医学类招生规模相对有限，竞争较为激烈，位次持续下滑趋势反映了报考热度上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量2026年医学类扩招18.75%的供给增加与历年位次持续下滑的强劲趋势，预计2026年武汉大学医学类最低录取位次约为8850名，较2025年继续小幅下滑（位次数字增大） ，波动区间预计在8584至9116名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical category in Jiangsu Province from 2021 to 2025 were 3904, 4527, 5238, 6275, and 7928 respectively, showing a continuous downward trend (ranking numbers increasing year by year), with a cumulative decline of 4024 places over five years and an average annual decline of about 1006 places. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 14 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 16 in 2025, showing an overall expansion trend. The total plan for medical category in 2026 is 19 students, an increase of 3 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 18.75%, which is relatively significant and has a certain downward pull effect on rankings (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, ranked among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with comprehensive strength among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines rely on the university's strong comprehensive platform, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors enjoying high reputations and strong appeal among Jiangsu Province candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with long-cycle programs such as clinical medicine and stomatology particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Although Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in central China, and not in the Yangtze River Delta region, as a nationally renowned 985 university, it still has strong appeal to Jiangsu candidates. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Jiangsu Province is relatively limited, competition is fierce, and the continuous downward trend in rankings reflects the rising popularity of applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 18.75% expansion in supply for the medical category in 2026 and the strong downward trend in historical rankings, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 8850, continuing a slight decline compared to 2025 (ranking number increases), with a fluctuation range expected between 8584 and 9116.
